title_variants: Luxury 14‑Guest Farmhouse with Hot Tub & Views
Boutique Farmhouse Retreat – 14 Guests, Hot Tub
Spacious Peak Forest Farmhouse, Hot Tub, 14 Guests
analysis.rewritten_desc:
Welcome to Cop Farm – a spacious, modern farmhouse built in 2006 that comfortably sleeps up to 14 guests. Nestled in the scenic Peak Forest, the property offers breathtaking mountain and valley views, a private hot‑tub, and a 75‑inch HDTV for evening entertainment. The open‑plan lounge is perfect for family gatherings, while the master bedroom suite boasts an en‑suite bathroom and a dedicated view of the surrounding countryside. Additional sleeping quarters provide ample space for larger groups, and a cot and high chair are available on request for families travelling with little ones. 
All essentials are supplied, including fresh linens, towels, a hairdryer, body soap, and extra pillows and blankets. Kitchen basics, a free washer and dryer, and an iron ensure a hassle‑free stay. For added comfort, a fireplace with safety guards keeps the evenings cosy. 
Guests have exclusive access to the entire home and its outdoor area, where the hot‑tub awaits under the stars. Please bring an extra towel for the tub. Note that we do not accept stag or all‑male bookings. With 61 high‑quality photos showcasing every room and view, Cop Farm promises a memorable countryside retreat for families, friends, or groups seeking luxury and space in the heart of England.
top_amenity_gaps: Exterior security cameras on the property
Clear on‑site parking information or dedicated parking space
analysis.photo_order_rec: Use the "View From Master Bedroom" shot as the cover photo—it highlights the dramatic valley and mountain vistas that set this listing apart and immediately captures guests’ attention.
key_diagnosis: Your nightly rate of £1,421 is +1255% above the city median (£104.90) while your 90‑day occupancy is only 35.9% versus the market average of 48.9% – consider a price adjustment or added value to boost bookings.
The current title does not leverage high‑impact keywords; replace it with a 50‑character, SEO‑friendly version that features "hot tub", "peak forest" and "14 guests" to improve search visibility.

Reorder the photo set so the first image is the panoramic view, reduce the total to ~30 targeted shots, and ensure each key amenity (hot tub, views, entertainment) appears within the first five photos to increase conversion.
analysis.outreach_hook: Your £1,421 nightly rate is 1255% above the local median, yet your 90‑day occupancy sits at 35.9% versus the market’s 48.9% – there’s a clear upside.
